title: oxalis latifolia subsp. schraderiana
intro: Oxalis latifolia subsp. schraderiana, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing uric acid levels, alleviating kidney stones, and supporting digestive health. Oxalis latifolia subsp. schraderiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
